item.title: INFRA: Pro AI Cloud Infrastructure
item.intent: The cloud relay for Pro AI must be minimal, private, and reliable — it routes requests to the AI provider and validates subscriptions, nothing more.
item.description: Lightweight API relay (serverless function or minimal server) that: validates App Store subscription receipt via StoreKit 2 server-side verification, forwards selected text to AI provider (initially Anthropic Claude per D-AI-7), streams response back to client, logs nothing (no prompts, no responses, no user data per D-AI-8). Client-side: StoreKit 2 subscription management, subscription status caching, graceful degradation on network failure (suggest local AI alternative). Privacy pipeline: only user-selected text sent (never full document silently), provider contractual no-retention.
acceptanceCriteria: Pro AI request completes end-to-end (client → relay → provider → client) in <5 seconds
Expired/invalid subscription receipt is rejected with clear user-facing message
Network failure during Pro AI request shows error and suggests using local AI instead
Server logs contain zero user content (prompts, responses, or file data)
Subscription status is cached client-side so the app doesn't block on network for every AI action
